message_list_observation: Observe only visible chat rows and top match circles.
Record visible reply-deadline markers such as 轮到您了, 回复时间, or 小时后失效 before opening a thread.
Opening Move match circles may require opening a prompt page before a normal composer exists.
thread_observation: Open the requested visible chat row or match circle.
If an Opening Move prompt is visible, record the prompt text and do not assume a normal message thread.
latest_inbound_messages must contain only messages after the user's latest outbound.
Record reply-deadline evidence separately from ordinary chat content.
stage_send_verification: Managed Bumble draft staging is not supported in this profile.
Do not paste or type into Bumble unless a future profile exposes a tested stage-draft path.
Opening the empty Opening Move reply composer is navigation only; it is not staged text verification.

launch_navigation.input_source_retry: Type the app name first, verify the English app search result by screenshot/OCR, then switch input source and retry only if the app result is not visible.

post_send_verification: Do not record a Bumble send result unless a future live-send profile adds exact staged-text and outbound-bubble verification.
known_gui_pitfalls: Bumble browse-card horizontal swipes can pass or like; do not use horizontal swipes for read-only navigation.
Top match circles and chat rows may expire if the required party does not reply before the visible deadline.
Opening Move pages are not normal chat threads until the reply composer is opened.
macOS pbcopy alone may not update iPhone Universal Clipboard; do not treat clipboard state as Bumble staging evidence.
Non-ABC input sources can leave app names in the iOS Spotlight candidate bar; verify the app result after typing before tapping.
Premium gates such as liked-you reveal and plan selection are not agent actions.
